name: Royal Bridal Choker Set
description: A complete bridal set comprising a heavily embossed kundan choker, matching jhumka earrings, maang tikka and hand harness. Each piece is crafted by master karigars in Rajasthan, using 22kt gold and traditionally polished flat kundan stones. This is heirloom jewellery — made to be passed down.
careInstructions: Store each piece separately in the provided silk pouches. Do not immerse in water. Professional cleaning recommended.
shipping: Ships within 7–10 business days with insured delivery. Free shipping on this item.
returns: Custom-order pieces are non-returnable. Exchange possible within 15 days for sizing adjustments.
